sources.label: Pizzeria Uno official site menu capture

sections.name: Notable overlaps and differences
items: The official Uno site menu closely matches the pasted takeout menu for appetizers, salads, deep dish pizzas, sandwiches, gluten sensitive pizzas, and desserts.
The official Uno site menu pasted here lists Pomodoro and Spaghetti with Meatballs in pasta, while the takeout capture also listed Romano-Crusted Chicken Parm and Chicken and Broccoli Alfredo.
The official Uno site menu pasted here included hours: Sunday through Saturday 11 AM-11 PM.

sections.name: Relationship to Uno
items: The Due menu overlaps heavily with Uno on appetizers, salads, deep dish pizzas, sandwiches, pastas, gluten sensitive pizzas, and desserts.
The pasted Due menu adds a Thin Crust Pizzas section with Windy City Works, Super Roni, Veggie Extravaganza Thin Crust, Northside Cheese Thin Crust, and Southside Sausage Thin Crust.
The pasted Due menu shared the Four Cheese and Pesto Deep Dish item description used for Uno.

phoneCallNotes: User said the phone call response can count for both Uno and Due.
Staff said there are no nuts on the menu.
Staff said there is pesto but it is nut free, and there are no nuts anywhere with the pizza.
Guests can tell the server, who will let the manager and the cooks know about the allergy.
Staff said they have recently handled severe nut allergies successfully.
notes: Stored from user-pasted Uno takeout menu, Uno site menu, Due menu, and phone call summary so future rescans can reuse the source material without refetching.
The Uno takeout menu and Uno site menu matched closely in the pasted sections, while Due appeared very similar but added a distinct thin crust section.
